name: morkit
description: Mor's all-in-one toolkit for OpenAI Codex CLI — spec workflow (propose/review/archive) + brainstorming/execute/TDD skills + 5-specialist deep code review + AI-agent doc generation (writing-docs). Single-source with the Claude Code variant: the same plugins/morkit/skills/ is symlinked into Codex; skills keep Claude vocab and are translated at runtime via using-morkit/references/codex-tools.md. Hooks gate uses apply_patch|Edit|Write|Skill matcher.

interface.shortDescription: Spec workflow + deep code review + AI-agent doc generation for Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: All-in-one Codex CLI toolkit, single-source with the Claude Code variant. Consolidates: spec workflow (propose/review/archive) + brainstorming/writing-plans/executing-plans/TDD/subagent-driven-development skills + 5-specialist parallel code review (deep-review, native multi_agent) + AI-agent documentation generation (writing-docs — docs/ taxonomy + AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md pointer). Single /morkit:* namespace via AGENTS.md bridge. INSTALL: codex plugin marketplace add mor-duongmh/morkit-plugin, then install plugin 'morkit'.
defaultPrompt: Bắt đầu propose spec change mới cho feature X
Chạy deep-review cho diff hiện tại
Generate bộ tài liệu docs/ cho project này
